goal: Reduce unsafe casts in high-value requests, buyer, and warehouse domain flows while preserving service validation/payload ownership and transport/provider IO ownership.

selectedDomainFlows: requests canonical request item counts and item row parsing
buyer inbox fallback/enrichment/status proposal lifecycle maps
buyer proposal/read guarded paged-query transport adapter
warehouse stock name-map source row loaders

notSelected.reason: Remaining request_reopen_atomic_v1 untyped RPC adapter is outside this batch's request item row/payload parsing slice. It remains covered by runtime validation tests and can be moved in a separate requests mutation transport wave.
Remaining warehouse casts are transport-owned provider boundary casts, not selected stock-report service source row parsing.
Remaining buyer/request/warehouse hits are test/mock casts or contract literal strings outside production domain flow code.

selectedFindingsBefore.flow: requests canonical request item/read row parsing

selectedFindingsBefore.pattern: client as unknown as BuyerInboxScopeRpcTransport and as unknown as PagedQuery<...>
selectedFindingsBefore.flow: buyer inbox scope RPC, proposal lifecycle maps, rejected-row enrichment, request status gate, fallback row parsing
warehouse stock name-map source row loaders

changes.change: Promoted guarded paged-query adapter to shared core API with runtime DTO row guard, malformed payload errors, provider error preservation, and null/undefined empty-list semantics.
Added untyped RPC transport adapter that delegates through the existing transport runner without creating additional Supabase provider call sites.
Replaced request canonical PagedQuery casts with guarded row adapters before request item count and item row service mapping.
Replaced buyer PagedQuery casts with guarded row adapters, removed buyer scope RPC unknown-as adapter, and removed direct row remapping casts in proposal/status/fallback flows.
Re-exported the shared guarded paged-query adapter to preserve existing buyer transport contract imports.
Replaced warehouse stock name-map PagedQuery casts with guarded UnknownRow adapters.

runtimeGuardCoverage.malformedRow: tests/api/guardedPagedQueryTransport.contract.test.ts rejects malformed row; tests/api/buyerLegacyApiWindow.test.ts rejects malformed buyer fallback row before mapping
runtimeGuardCoverage.missingOptionalField: tests/api/guardedPagedQueryTransport.contract.test.ts accepts rows with missing optional qty
runtimeGuardCoverage.nullValues: tests/api/guardedPagedQueryTransport.contract.test.ts accepts nullable qty and null provider payload as empty list

selectedFilesUnsafePatterns.command: git grep -n -E "as any|unknown as|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error" -- src/lib/api/requestCanonical.read.ts src/lib/api/buyer.ts src/screens/warehouse/warehouse.stockReports.service.ts src/screens/buyer/buyer.repo.read.transport.ts src/lib/api/_core.ts src/lib/api/_core.transport.ts

domainBroaderScan.command: git grep -n -E "as any|unknown as|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error" -- src/lib/api src/screens/buyer src/screens/warehouse tests/api tests/buyer tests/warehouse
remainingCategories: non-selected request reopen/director transport or service-adjacent casts
